pageSpeedRerunSteps.description: Specific PageSpeed/Lighthouse rerun steps after implementing fixes. Must reference real URLs and tools.

beforeAfterComparisons.description: Before/after comparison checks to validate score improvements. Must reference actual audit IDs.

regressionChecks.description: Regression checks to ensure existing behavior is preserved after changes.

manualQaNotes.description: Manual QA notes for a human tester to verify the fixes work as expected.

codingAgentVerification.description: Verification instructions a coding agent can follow after implementing fixes, referencing Lighthouse/browser DevTools.

stopAndAskTriggers.description: Conditions that should stop the workflow and ask a human for clarification before proceeding.
